content.en:
Ye Tian has a lot of wealth, and he has been hunting the extra-dimensional creatures of the third realm for many years, and he has also robbed the wealth of those extra-dimensional creatures of the third realm, so now he can easily take out tens of millions of extra-dimensional dao coins.

So, he participated in the auction of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence.

And many third realms also want to bid for the three-realm multi-dimensional healing essence, many third-realm have been seriously injured and have not yet recovered, so they naturally need the three-realm multi-dimensional healing essence.

There are also third realm extra-dimensional realms that want to buy the three-realm multi-dimensional healing essence to prepare for the future.

No one can guarantee that they will not be hit hard by their own incurable in the future, if there is a three-realm multi-dimensional healing essence at that time, there is no need to worry.

So, everyone wants to prepare a drop or two of such a good thing.

Of course, the auction price of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence will not be too high, after all, the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce will auction one or two drops from time to time, so there is no need to pay too high a price.

The Moon Appreciation Realm Lord is also a cultivator who has fallen sharply, and she was chased and killed by the Blazing Yang Palace, otherwise she herself could come to participate in the auction and obtain the multi-dimensional healing essence of the Three Realms to heal her injuries.

2,000,000 Super Dimension Dao Coins!

3,000,000 Super Dimension Dao Coins!

The bidding price of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence became higher and higher, and it was finally fixed at 5.6 million Super Dimensional Dao Coins, which was auctioned off by Ye Tian. 650

Since there are many auction items, you can choose to redeem them immediately after the auction, or you can choose to exchange them together after the auction is over.

Ye Tian naturally didn't want to waste time, so he went to pay 5.6 million super dimensional dao coins as soon as possible, and got this drop of the Three Realms Multi-dimensional Healing Essence.

Looking at this drop of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence, Ye Tian was full of emotion.

This thing is more valuable than the other two multi-dimensional essences, after all, it can save lives.

"The Jiucai Chamber of Commerce should have a multi-dimensional treasure bottle of healing, and with this kind of treasure, it will sell some multi-dimensional healing essence from time to time, which is enough to earn a huge amount of wealth. If I sell multi-dimensional essences, I can also obtain a huge amount of wealth, but unfortunately I don't have this background, if I dare to sell it, I will definitely be robbed!"

Ye Tian broke off his mind of selling multi-dimensional essences, and now he still has a purpose, which is to see if there are Ka Ye wisdom leaves in this auction.

In order to prevent this copy body from being targeted, he used another copy body to secretly send away that drop of multi-dimensional healing essence, and he practiced the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, using the Great Realm Armor Technique to cover the breath of the multi-dimensional healing essence, even the fourth realm could not perceive it.

Soon.

This drop of multi-dimensional healing essence was silently sent by Ye Tian to another copy body.

Time passed slowly, and the items that were auctioned off became more and more precious.

Suddenly.

A leaf glowing with gold and silver was sent to the auction table, this leaf was not small, about the size of a small world, and it was sealed inside a void ball, but it could not hinder the prying eyes of many extradimensional realms.

"Such a big leaf, one side has golden lines, exuding golden light, and the other side has silver lines, exuding silver light, the breath is incomparably majestic, and it also contains powerful energy, if I guess correctly, this should be the Wisdom Leaf !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked that the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce really took out a piece of Jiaye Wisdom Leaf!

"The Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce knows that the Jiaye wisdom body was snatched away by a third realm, but now it has taken out the Jiaye wisdom leaf?"

"Bait?"

Ye Tian didn't dare to guarantee whether this was a bait or not, but he was really moved!

At this time.

Many extradimensional realms were also shocked, but they frowned.

The Kasaba Wisdom Leaf can not only be used as the main material for cultivating the Kasaba wisdom body, but can also be used to improve the comprehension and comprehend the extradimensional rules.

In the past, although the price of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf was expensive, it was only about the price of more than three million super dimensional Dao Coins, but now with the birth of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, its price is more than that.

Of course.

If you don't have the extradimensional realm inherited by the wisdom body of the Ka Ye, even if you want to bid for it (CBFE), you can't pay too many extradimensional Dao coins.

Therefore, Ye Tian should not have too powerful competitors.

It didn't take long for the bidding price of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf to soar to 4 million Super Dimensional Dao Coins.

At this time, there were few third realms still participating in the auction.

Ye Tian is one, and there are two existences at the peak of the third realm.

But one of the two Extradimensional Realms at the peak of the Third Realm, after the price soared to 6 million Extradimensional Dao Coins, they gave up the bidding, leaving only Ye Tian and another Transcendent Realm at the peak of the Third Realm.

7 million!

8 million!

9 million!

It was no longer reasonable for the price of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf to soar to this extent, and it was impossible for the ordinary Third Realm to bid on it.

"No, this guy may be !!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

What if the other party is a third realm trust of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, just to raise the price of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf.

Under normal circumstances, the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce will not arrange trust, in case exposure will affect their business.

But what if the other party's goal is to lead to the third realm where they have obtained the wisdom of the Kasya?

Use a piece of Ka Ye wisdom leaf to lead out the third realm of getting the Ka Ye wisdom body, if you snatch the Ka Ye wisdom body, then you will make a lot of money!

"I'm crazy to participate in the auction, I will definitely be targeted by the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce, they will definitely doubt me!"

Ye Tian thought so.

But if he chooses to give up, he can't do it!

This may be the only chance he has to get the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf at the moment, once he has practiced the Ka Ye Wisdom Ye, then his growth speed will be terrifying, and it will no longer be difficult to break through to the fourth realm.

Therefore, he was eager to obtain the wisdom leaf of the Kasya.

He kept deducing in his mind how to take away the wisdom leaf of Kaba next, and after some deduction, he finally calculated an opportunity.

"If I take a picture of the Jiaye Wisdom Leaf, the Fourth Realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce will definitely use the secret technique to stare at me, and even this Jiaye Wisdom Leaf may have some kind of mark that is difficult to get rid of, so that the Fourth Realm can track it. "

In this way, it is indeed very difficult for him to take away the wisdom leaf of Ka Ye.

But if he is not disappointed, he is at least seventy percent sure.

After a while, Ye Tian and the other party continued to bid, and finally won the bid of 12 million super dimensional dao coins, and they are still participating in the auction.

Ultimately.

Ye Tian auctioned this piece of Jiaye Wisdom Leaf at a terrifying price of 18 million super dimensional Dao coins.

At this time, many of the eyes of the Third Realm stared at the box where Ye Tian was a little shocked, and showed a meaningful gaze.
